Items.Item: Rarity: RARE Agony Cry Convoking Wand Unique ID: ead86ba1d7da091f169133f470b2c2983b83cc7ac691f82dfee1ea88e8654850 Item Level: 83 Quality: 20 Sockets: W-W-W LevelReq: 72 Implicits: 3 {crafted}Quality does not increase Physical Damage {crafted}Grants 1% increased Area of Effect per 4% Quality Minions deal 30% increased Damage {fractured}Minions deal 66% increased Damage {fractured}Minions have 5% chance to deal Double Damage +1 to Level of all Spell Skill Gems +1 to Level of all Minion Skill Gems Minions have 101% increased Critical Strike Chance Minions have +10% to Critical Strike Multiplier {crafted}Minions have 15% increased Attack Speed {crafted}Minions have 15% increased Cast Speed
